message: Morning, all. Laptop open, brain mostly engaged - got the corn dog copy ready for eyes whenever you want to dive in.
Perfect timing - let me grab it and we can walk through together?
Yeah, sounds good - fair warning though, I leaned into the texture over the clever stuff, so it might read longer than expected at first pass.
Longer is fine if it earns its space - what's the texture angle actually doing for the recipe?
Margaret's right - if the texture detail helps someone actually understand why the cornmeal matters, that's worth the extra words.
Cornmeal structure - got it. Send it over and I'll read it through. If it holds up, we're done here.
